SRC-0001.title: IRS About Form 1120, U.S. Corporation Income Tax Return

SRC-0003.title: PCAOB AS 2201: An Audit of Internal Control Over Financial Reporting That Is Integrated with An Audit of Financial Statements

jurisdictions.name: Federal Tax
jurisdictions.role: corporate income-tax return authority and IRS adversary lane

governing_law.basis: Federal corporate income-tax return work is routed to IRS Form 1120 source material in SRC-0001.

forum.basis: IRS return, examination, assessment, transcript, and controversy routes are anchored to the federal tax authority source in SRC-0001.

tax.basis: Domestic corporations use Form 1120 to report income, gains, losses, deductions, credits, and income-tax liability under SRC-0001.

licenses.basis: SRC-0001 is a federal income-tax return authority; operating licenses route to the activity-specific regulator after intake.

filings.basis: Corporate income-tax return preparation, instructions, schedules, and related IRS materials route through SRC-0001.

deadlines.due: Entity-specific federal return due date from current IRS instructions
deadlines.desc: Compute the Form 1120 filing and extension deadline from the taxpayer year-end, return posture, and current IRS instructions linked from SRC-0001.

jurisdictions.name: SEC Reporting
jurisdictions.role: Exchange Act reporting and disclosure authority

governing_law.basis: SEC periodic and current-reporting work routes to the SEC forms list and filing instructions in SRC-0002.

forum.basis: SEC filing, comment-letter, amendment, disclosure-review, and EDGAR form-routing issues are mapped to SRC-0002.

tax.basis: SRC-0002 is a securities-disclosure authority; tax-return positions route to the federal tax lane in SRC-0001.

licenses.basis: Registrant reporting posture and form eligibility are securities-compliance routing questions anchored to SRC-0002.

filings.basis: Annual, quarterly, current, registration, proxy, ownership, and other SEC forms route through SRC-0002 before EDGAR submission.

deadlines.due: Registrant-specific deadline from current SEC form and filer-status rules
deadlines.desc: Compute the filing calendar from form type, fiscal period, filer status, event trigger, and current SEC instructions linked from SRC-0002.

governing_law.basis: Integrated audit and internal-control-over-financial-reporting testing routes to PCAOB AS 2201 in SRC-0003.

forum.basis: Issuer-audit inspection, deficiency, restatement, and audit-review challenges route to the PCAOB authority source in SRC-0003.

tax.basis: SRC-0003 is an audit-standard authority; tax-return assertions route to the federal tax lane in SRC-0001.

licenses.basis: Issuer-audit engagement, control testing, and audit-firm compliance questions route through the PCAOB standard source in SRC-0003.

filings.basis: Audit-control support for SEC reporting packets is mapped to AS 2201 source material in SRC-0003 before Chief approval.

deadlines.due: Audit timetable tied to issuer reporting calendar and current audit plan
deadlines.desc: Tie internal-control testing, deficiency evaluation, management representation, and audit sign-off timing to the reporting calendar and PCAOB audit standard source in SRC-0003.

jurisdictions.name: US GAAP
jurisdictions.role: accounting recognition, measurement, presentation, and disclosure authority

governing_law.basis: Accounting recognition, measurement, presentation, and disclosure research routes to the FASB Accounting Standards Codification source in SRC-0004.

forum.basis: SRC-0004 is an accounting-authority source, not a court forum; disputes route by matter type after intake.

tax.basis: Book-tax difference analysis must reconcile GAAP accounting positions from SRC-0004 to tax-return positions routed under SRC-0001.

licenses.basis: SRC-0004 is an accounting-standard source; professional licensing is handled by the responsible CPA/auditor authority outside this pack.

filings.basis: GAAP financial statement assertions, footnotes, and SEC reporting support must cite accounting guidance routed through SRC-0004.

deadlines.desc: Complete accounting-policy research, close entries, tie-outs, and footnote support before the human-sealed reporting deadline using SRC-0004 as the accounting-authority lane.

governing_law.basis: Beneficial-ownership reporting and AML-adjacent compliance routing are anchored to FinCEN BOI authority in SRC-0005.

forum.basis: FinCEN reporting, correction, exemption, and enforcement-response paths route through SRC-0005.

tax.basis: SRC-0005 is a beneficial-ownership and financial-crimes source; tax-return issues route to SRC-0001.

licenses.basis: FinCEN reporting status, exemption analysis, and financial-crimes compliance implications are mapped to SRC-0005.

filings.basis: BOI report, correction, update, exemption, and supporting documentation workflows route through SRC-0005.

deadlines.due: Entity-specific BOI deadline from current FinCEN guidance
deadlines.desc: Compute the reporting, update, correction, or exemption deadline from current FinCEN BOI guidance linked in SRC-0005.
